title: Local Inference With Ollama
summary: Run a local CLI workflow with Ollama generation and local embeddings, without a Voyage API key.
prerequisites: Ollama is installed and running locally.
The `llama3.2:3b` model is already pulled in Ollama.
`vai nano setup` has already completed successfully.
commands: ollama run llama3.2:3b "In 4 short lines, explain why pairing a local LLM with local embeddings is useful for CLI demos."
vai embed "Local inference keeps retrieval private, fast, and API-key free." --local --dimensions 256

social.headline: Local inference with Ollama and local embeddings, no Voyage API key required.
social.linkedinText: This VAI demo is a great example of a reproducible local workflow: Ollama for generation, local embeddings for retrieval, and no Voyage API key required. The gallery page includes the exact commands plus the original source tape.
social.xText: Local inference demo with VAI: Ollama for generation, local embeddings for retrieval, no Voyage API key required. Commands + source tape included.
social.callToAction: Try the local workflow yourself and share the source tape.

underTheHood.vaiCommand: vai embed "Local inference keeps retrieval private, fast, and API-key free." --local --dimensions 256

voyageApi.node: // No remote Voyage AI API call.\n// --local routes this command through the local voyage-4-nano bridge instead.
voyageApi.python: # No remote Voyage AI API call.\n# --local routes this command through the local voyage-4-nano bridge instead.
voyageApi.curl: # No remote Voyage AI API call.\n# --local routes this command through the local voyage-4-nano bridge instead.

mongoQuery.node: // No MongoDB query in this demo.\n// The command computes the embedding locally and prints it to stdout.
mongoQuery.python: # No MongoDB query in this demo.\n# The command computes the embedding locally and prints it to stdout.

explanations.vaiCommand: The --local flag switches the command from hosted embeddings to the local voyage-4-nano bridge so the workflow stays private and API-key free.
explanations.voyageApi: Because this flow is intentionally local, there is no outgoing Voyage AI API request. The transparency here is making that absence explicit.
explanations.mongoQuery: There is no MongoDB write or search in this demo. It is focused on proving that local embeddings work before any storage layer is introduced.
